greeting: Hey! 👋 I'm Ryan's portfolio assistant. How can I help?

options.label: 🧑‍💻 Quick rundown of who Ryan is

responses.about: NUS Double Degree (BSc Business Analytics + BBA) building anything I find interesting (recently some LLM knowledge bases and systems). Also an enthusiast of anything interestingly complex like Vim or Rust!

chatbot_first: You really thought that was gonna work?? I'm not paying for an actual LLM service to run this!! 😭💸

Though I *have* had experience building the UI frontend for a chatbot wrapper during my internship at SAP, and have also worked extensively with LLM tools — MCP tool calls, crafting LLM skills, building robust knowledge bases, and prompting significantly to build codebases quick and with quality. This entire portfolio was built with Claude as a pair programmer!

But hey, maybe one day when OpenAI gives me free credits...

Maybe you can find some entertainment trying to find an easter egg on this site...
